content.en:
Time passed, and Ye Tian searched many places in the Extreme Dao Source Sea with the body of the Void Soul Sparrow.

I have to say that the Extreme Dao Source Sea is really huge, and there are a lot of resources here, Ye Tian continued to search, and he did find some good resources, all of which were the resources that the Extreme Dao creatures missed or looked down on or didn't know, and he took them away one by one.

It's a pity that the Extreme Treasure that can transform the will is still not found.

"How big is the Extreme Dao Source Sea? Why don't you keep shuttling!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

So, he kept shuttling, wanting to shuttle to the end of the Extreme Dao Source Sea.

Time passed slowly, and Ye Tian suddenly found that from the deepest area of the Extreme Dao Source Sea, the pressure was getting stronger and stronger, as if there was a hidden force hindering him from moving forward.

However, Ye Tian's strength is not weak, so he can still move forward.

Finally, on this day, Ye Tian sensed a large number of extreme creatures.

"That's a lot of Extreme Creatures!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Before, many of the Extreme Creatures he had seen were alone, and although there were also groups of Extreme Creatures, the number was also very small.

This time, however, he sensed a large number of Extreme Creatures.

"Little one, this is not the place for you to come!"

A voice came into Ye Tian's ears.

The next moment, an extreme creature appeared in front of Ye Tian.

"What a terrifying aura, it feels even more terrifying than the Lord of Time!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

The Void Sparrow's replica body also carries the mark of the Copying Talent, so the talent of this Extreme Creature can be observed.

This Extreme Creature is called the Great Sun King Monkey, and its appearance is that of a fiery red monkey, and its size is not large among the Extreme Path creatures, but it has four perfection-level ancestral endowments on its body.

Of course, this Great Sun King Monkey does not have the Extreme Dao Ancestral Endowment, and in terms of potential, it is definitely inferior to the Void Infinite, but it has grown up, and its strength is terrifying.

Moreover, the other party did not hide the extreme power in his body at all.

The Pole of Fire!

The Extreme Way of Strength!

Golden Pole Road!

Dark Pole!

He has mastered a total of four extreme powers.

"There are very few beings who have mastered the four extreme realms among the super-perfect masters. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

Moreover, the four extreme paths of this Great Sun King Monkey have not just been enlightened, and the realm is much higher than his extreme paths.

"Why can't I come here?"

Ye Tian asked in a milky voice.

After all, his current identity is the Void Sparrow, and he is a Void Sparrow that has just been conceived for a short time, so naturally he can't show his stuff, just keep the appearance of not understanding anything.

"Little guy, you were bred in the Extreme Dao Source Sea not long ago, and there is no race, you don't even know about it. This is the entrance to the Extreme Dao Deep Sea, without the strength of the perfect controller of the Three Realms, you can't enter the Extreme Dao Deep Sea! Although every billion eternal years, some places will be opened here, but you are too weak, and the quota will definitely not be given to you. Also, it's not a safe area. There are rules in the Extreme Dao Source Sea, and you can't do anything with each other, so you can grow safely. But there are no rules, anyone can do anything to you. You little guy has no backing, be careful of being swallowed by other extreme creatures!" reminded the Great Sun King Monkey.

"Extreme creatures in the Extreme Dao Source Sea can't do anything with each other?"

Only then did Ye Tian understand that it was not that the Extreme Dao creatures were very kind to each other, but that there was a rule that other Extreme Dao creatures did not dare to violate.

However, once you are here, you don't need to follow that rule.

But what the extreme path of the deep sea is, he has heard of it for the first time.

"What's the benefit of going into the Extreme Deep Sea?"

Ye Tian asked ignorantly.

The Great Sun King Monkey seemed to have been here for a long time, a little bored, and had a good temperament, but he didn't dislike Ye Tianfu, so he explained: "Let this king tell you, the Extreme Deep Sea is the holy land of our Extreme Dao creatures. As for the Extreme Dao Source Sea, it is just a special space-time area built by the big shots of the Extreme Dao Deep Sea to cultivate their juniors. There are countless precious treasures in the deep sea of the Extreme Road, and when we enter there, we can continue to grow. Moreover, in the Extreme Dao Source Sea, the rules here are not perfect, and there is no way to be promoted to the perfect controller of the Three Realms. "

Extreme path creatures, like cultivators, have reached the level of super-perfect controllers, and most of them also have to cultivate, master the power of the extreme path, and comprehend the power of the extreme path.

The Extreme Path Creature that can truly rely on the bloodline to step into the perfect controller of the Void Realm is almost a legend, and it is too rare.

"What's that?"

Ye Tian looked at the incomparably huge portal.

"That's the Gate of the Extreme Path, and it's also an opportunity, if you go directly through the Gate of the Extreme Path, even if your cultivation is very low, you can directly enter the Extreme Dao Deep Sea. Otherwise, we must stay around here honestly and attack the perfect controller of the Void Realm. It is only in this vicinity that the rules of the extreme path are perfected, and there is hope for a breakthrough. After the breakthrough, you can go to the Extreme Deep Sea. If you can't break through, just wait for the opportunity, after all, every billion eternal years, a place will be born, and all the Extreme Dao creatures are waiting for that place, so everyone is in competition. The Great Sun King Monkey explained.

"Gate of the Extreme Path, can I enter?"

Ye Tian asked.

"What are you doing when you enter the Gate of the Extreme Dao?" the Great Sun King Monkey admonished, "Your cultivation is too low, and the Gate of the Extreme Dao can only enter three times in total, don't waste the opportunity." "

"What is the benefit of the Gate of the Extreme Path?"

Ye Tian asked.

Subsequently, the Great Sun King Monkey also said.

It turns out that the Gate of the Extreme Path is a test, and at the same time, it is also a Extreme Treasure.

After entering the gate of the Extreme Path, you must protect yourself with the power of the Extreme Path, otherwise you will not be able to walk on the Golden Path of the Extreme Path at all.

The Golden Road is divided into steps, and if you walk up a thousand steps, you can enjoy the Golden Light of the Golden Path once.

The Extreme Golden Light is one of the most coveted opportunities for these Extreme Path creatures, and if they accept the Extreme Golden Light, they can temper their will, make their will transform, and increase the chance of breaking through to the perfect controller of the Void Realm.

However, it is too difficult to get up to the thousandth step!

And each Extreme Path creature can only go up three times, if you go in when you are weak, wouldn't it be a waste of opportunity.

Even the Great Sun King Monkey has only been there twice so far, and the third chance has not been used.

"Extreme Golden Light, can temper the will, if I accept the Extreme Golden Light, is there any hope that the half-step perfect will of the Extreme Realm will be raised to the level of the Extreme Will?"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

It's a possibility, and it's an opportunity for him.

So, he prepared to enter the gate of the Extreme Path.
